Initial Outreach - Cold

Sub: Question about {{company}}'s sales process

Founder CRM

Hi {{firstName}}, I've been following {{company}} and noticed your impressive growth in the SaaS sector. I wanted to reach out and see how you're currently managing your sales pipeline and if Founder CRM could help streamline your team's workflow.

Follow-up - No Response

Sub: Checking in on my last email

Consulting

Hey {{firstName}}, just bumping this to the top of your inbox. I know you're likely busy at {{company}}, but I'd love to chat briefly about the infrastructure project we discussed. Let me know if you have 10 minutes later this week.

Product Demo Request

Sub: Seeing {{product}} in action

Founder CRM

It was great to connect briefly at the event. You mentioned wanting to see how {{product}} handles multi-territory lead distribution. I've set up a sandbox environment for {{company}} if you'd like to dive in and take a look.

Partnership Inquiry

Sub: Collaborating with {{company}}

API Access

I'm writing to you because I believe there's a significant synergy between our API solutions and the current product roadmap at {{company}}. We've recently helped companies in your space increase integration speed by 40%.

Post-Call Summary

Sub: Great chatting today!

Infrastructure

Thanks for taking the time to speak with me earlier, {{firstName}}. As promised, I've attached the case study showing how our infrastructure supports global scale for firms like {{company}}. Looking forward to our next deep dive session.

Re-engagement

Sub: Long time no see, {{firstName}}

Nexus Layer

Hi {{firstName}}, it's been a few months since we last touched base about Nexus Layer. I saw the recent news about {{company}}'s Series B — massive congratulations! I'd love to reconnect and show you how we've updated our scaling tools.
